properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v3 v4 v5 v8 v4 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Dream after dream, You are speaking to me, Breathing, word after word, Of kingdom come.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Here at Your feet, I can see the unseen, Truly, one look at You, And I'm undone.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I run to, the Throne Room, I run to, the Throne Room.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And I fall on my face With angels and saints, And all I can say is Holy, Holy, Holy Are You God.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: My heart can't contain, The weight of Your Name, And all I can say is, Holy, Holy, Holy Are You.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Grace upon grace, All my, fear falls away, Only, Your perfect love, For me remains.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Time after time, You stay, close by my side, Burning, fire inside, I can't contain.

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: I run to the Throne Room Before You, the only One, I run to the Throne Room Before You, I'm overcome, I run to the Throne Room Before You, the only One, I run to the Throne Room Before You, I'm overcome.
